review_title: Top All-in-One Ranking Software Platform
description: The accuracy of keywords in the SERPs over desktop and mobile is amazing!
author: Mike W.
pros: With over 15 years of experience in SEO and web marketing, I've bought into every ranking software platform in the market. I can tell you with high confidence that Nightwatch is by far the most accurate in terms of their keyword ranking over desktop and mobile plus they have other very helpful features such as pulling in valuable data from Moz, Ahrefs, and Majestic that is super friendly that saves me a ton of money on from buying those other platforms which are expensive. I purchased their Pro account and with it you can also white-label your reports to make them look professional and branded to your business. Additionally, Nightwatch allows me to spy on local competitor websites which is helpful information. Nightwatch.io is a must-have purchase for any digital marketing agency looking for an all-in-one solution for their clients and also to help grow their business. I've been with Nightwatch for over 3 years now and it's one of the best business decisions I've made.
cons: Even though they already pull in valuable data from other platforms such as Ahrefs, Moz, and Majestic I'd like to see additional tools and features from those places.

review_title: For when other tools fail... I turn to NightWatch
description: Great so far. Never really needed any support as things are very clear cut.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Everything is great about the tool especially the hyper local geo tracking.
cons: Can get pricey the more KWs you add. But if you are making money then there is really no excuse.

review_title: Nightwatch: Automation tool
description: Nightwatch is great. I like it but I found Cypress more handy and easy. So we switched from Nightwatch to Cypress.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. It uses JS so its easy to use and run tests 2. Implementation of cucumber (BDD) is so simple. 3. Cool report can be generated using the html reporter.
cons: 1. Driver is required for API test. 2. The CICD seems a bit daunting in comparison to Cypress.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nightwatch - Deep Keyword and Link Tracking Tool
description: Overall, the tool is perfect for my needs, and I would recommend it to anyone who is in need of a keyword tracking tool.
author: Kevin S.
pros: The tool is very simple and easy to use. It tracks keywords that I select accurately and displays SERPs in the tool. It allows me to track competitors and stay ahead of them in Google search, as well as create visuals and graphs to display my results to my seniors for reporting. The URL and link tracking built in to the tool is also helpful in identifying what sites are linking to mine, and whether the quality of the URL is worth reaching out for more links.
cons: The only negative thing I could say about the tool is the pricing. Not that it isn't a great value at all pricing options, but it would be a nice nod to continued and valued customers to provide incentives to continue using the tool, such as retainment pricing or extras.

review_title: As a online marketing agency we cant live without Nightwatch!
description: As a online marketing agency we cant live without Nightwatch! It helps​ us keep a track of the rankings of our client but provide much more like competition insight and some advanced seo data. Alsp on love with the new added integration of analytics and Search console. Keep up the good work guys!
author: ✓ Elia Q.
pros: a lot of updates, much more then only ranktracking, very easy to use.
cons: I miss the overall overview. We do a lot of work for clients and sometimes you just want to group some domains in one report. The dashboard now works, but is not very easy to use yet. Im sure they will fix this in a future update. Would also love to see seo audits implemented (like woorank or semrush), but i believe they already building this (awesome!)

review_title: I'm using Nightwatch from the start on, and I'm having an excellent experience ever since.
author: Jaka S.
pros: What I like the most about Nightwatch is the visual representation of rankings, especially overall average position and evolution for specific keywords. In a split second, I can see how well we perform for a certain time period. It is a user-friendly, yet powerful tool that does the job!!
cons: So far so good. I just hope that it won't become too big, with gazillion features, where UX could suffer. But I understand that the target audience of NightWatch are SEO marketing experts who appreciate features beyond simple rank-tracking.

review_title: Our Rank Tracking Software of Choice
description: Accurate keyword rank tracking is a must for our organization. We were using their Ranktrackr product already, loved it, and decided to upgrade. Good investment.
author: Jordan F.
pros: We moved to Nightwatch after using several other keyword ranking trackers. Why? The #1 thing we need from a SERP tracker is accuracy, and we've found nothing better. The ability to apply numerous filters and see multiple factors including Map Pack rankings is icing on the cake. Add in keyword suggestions, competitor tracking, and backlink tracking, and you've got one of the most powerful keyword SEO tools in the industry. We use Nightwatch on every project, from solopreneurs to large international corporations. It works, saves us time, and helps us increase profits.
cons: Took a bit of time to figure out how to implement multiple GA and GSC accounts, but support was excellent in helping us. Works flawlessly.

review_title: If you need a stable and powerful SEO tracker tool, the Nightwatch is for you
description: We spent a long time to look forward SEO tracker that we can track our SEO performance in a few countries both desktop and mobile keywords, but not only our performance - the key is that we can easily track our competitors and analyse all visibility. Nowadays analysing the big amount of data and drawing conclusions is the right way to be on top in SERPs. In Nightwatch, you can find a lot of dimensions and advanced filters (every data freak find something for them). You can create custom keyword groups, graphs and reports - for faster accessibility.
author: Paweł W.
pros: - easily track competitors and analyse all visibility - lot of dimensions and advanced filters - custom keyword groups, graphs and reports
cons: - not all features are live, but hope they will be

review_title: Great Rank Tracking Functionality and More
author: Pavel S.
pros: The best thing about Nightwatch is that it delivers on rank tracking but also provides many other additional features.
cons: There was one time Nightwatch showed some inaccurate data in the number of Indexed pages. That was caused by Google according to support and it only happened once.

review_title: Best bang for your buck!
description: It has been excellent. The customer service is on par and always responsive. Service is high quality. What more can you ask for?
author: Trevor N.
pros: I have used and tested many different rank trackers over the years, from hosted to self hosted. I always had complaints with what I was using until I discovered Nightwatch. The setup is a breeze and everything "just works". The ability to view certain metrics such as Majestic TF/CF, backlinks, and analytics all from within Nightwatch is a huge time saver for us.
cons: Nothing so far. If I had to pick something I would say I would like to monitor more backlinks without upgrading to the next plan up.

review_title: Great Tracking Site
description: Very positive
author: Jim P.
pros: Feature-rich dashboard. Competitor tracking
cons: There was somewhat of a learning curve
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best testing framework
author: Sanjeep L.
pros: Nightwatch become powerful weapon for testing. Apart from this some good side are listed below: - It has in built command line which makes tester easy to test any website - GUI is very attractive - Flexible and easy
cons: It would be better if GUI is confusing even GUI is attractive, it takes time to understand. Till now Nigthwatch is one of the perfect tool to test.

review_title: Best for Local Search Listings
description: I work primarily in non-metropolitan areas with low search volume. I tried Moz, SEM Rush & Ahrefs and just could not get the accuracy of rankings like what Nightwatch provides. Solid tool.
author: Tori W.
pros: This software is accurate with rankings in small non-metropolitan areas.
cons: Not much, I can fault, would be good if the UX was a little more swift.

review_title: Excellent Customer Support - Affordable SEO product
author: Cuong P.
pros: Easy to Use - Affordable - Quick & Friendly Customer Support
cons: Although the keyword ranking check is quite slow for precise location, it still does the job
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good Tracking Tool
description: I have used it for over five years. Good product
author: Kurt S.
pros: How detailed can I get with reviews for local search
cons: Possibly more of a creative visual report to hand to clients.

review_title: My Most Favorite Everyday Tool - Nightwatch
description: Nightwatch makes me look like a professional when talking to clients. It has contributed so much to business. Love it and thanks to team behind Nightwatch. They have done a great job and I never and ever had an issue with them. The software never glitched so I don't have to worry about the downtime of the software.
author: Wilson T.
pros: Ohhhh! There are so many things I like about Nightwatch. First most important thing is the automated report to be sent out to my clients. This has been the most valuable feature to my business. Report can be customised based on the package my client has signed up. It is so easy to customise and setup an automated report. The white labelling is the huge plus to the report. I can customise the email to be sent out with the report. Each client get a personalised email with their ranking report. Next, let talk about the rankings. Because I am doing local SEO and Nightwatch has been able to track the local keywords precisely. Did I mention about google map listing? Oh Yes! Nightwatch is so capable in tracking Google snack pack. Daily ranking update has been another reason why I liked Nightwatch so much. With daily ranking update I am able to go back to the history to see the rankings on specific date. Of course, they are so many rank tracking tools today but no one has come even closer to Nightwatch. You get what you paid for.
cons: Nothing I can about dislike this software as it is an amazing rank tracker software. I love it because I use it everyday.

review_title: Nightwatch
description: I was searching for a good rank tracker and failed to find something that was really worth the price. That's until I found Nightwatch, and it has changed my life and my workflow. I cannot work a day professionally without Nightwatch and it's amazing cache of features. Nightwatch is an amazing piece of software and the flexibility to see different type of stats at the same time gives me an excellent picture of what my seo campaigns are doing. Seeing backlinks grow is great for my team and perfect for my client. Watching how my client is doing against the same niche is helpful for planning.
author: Craig R.
pros: The graphical design of Nightwatch is amazing. It's easy to read and understand because of the excellent UX/UI design. I don't see anything else on the net that comes even close, and the ones that do come close they look like Candyland. Nightwatch looks like the future went back in time and gave the designers a sneak peak at what design will become. The amount of information sent to me from the Nightwatch team in my emails and their blog posts has changed the way I do some of my SEO. The reports that Nightwatch churn out is amazing, easy to read, and you can slap your logo on them and send them straight to the clients. No need to mess around. It's all there. It's amazing how professional these reports look like. I'm not a super big SEO superhero, but Nightwatch makes me look like one.
cons: There isn't really a lot to complain about. I want more reports and custom reports, but those features are coming.

review_title: Powerful, Yet Affordable
description: Nightwatch has been a great benefit to my business and I can’t imagine finding the same tool with just as many features for the price I pay.
author: Taylor W.
pros: Night watch is the perfect keyword tracking tool for small businesses like mine. it is very affordable while also providing all the insights and features I need. The dashboard is clean, easy to use, and looks great. Although I am a small business now, I know Nightwatch will also be able to accommodate my needs as I grow.
cons: Some sort of mobile app to check rankings on the go.

review_title: NightwatchJS Test Framework
description: For the most part, it's a solid tool. There are some core issues that our team has had to workaround but generally speaking it gets the job done.
author: John K.
pros: Open source, easy to install and get started. Good documentation. Does most things well.
cons: It's open source so there is little to no "customer support" and the development team is not always quick to respond to issues. The tool utilizes Javascript and the asynchronous nature of JS can be VERY frustrating when putting together test flows that you expect to run synchronously.

review_title: Accurate Rank Tracker for SEOs
description: Overall a great tool for content marketers.
author: Shaikat R.
pros: Nightwatch provides accurate rank tracking data for your keywords in various search engines. The Bing tracker is an excellent feature of this tool. The lowest plan offers good amount of tracking credits. And, it comes with other features If you want to get your hands on Nightwatch, you can try their 14-days free trial. Overall a modern tool for SEOS, and content marketers.
cons: For beginners, the price is not convenient. For less price, you can get other tools on the market.

review_title: Great Product
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ability to track and monitor our search engine optimization efforts through the Nightwatch platform has been a game changer for our company. Managing the amounts of clients we have and the plethora of data necessary to do the best work possible for them has never been simpler with the URL dashboard. This service has enabled us to not only better serve our customers but has allowed us to deepen their trust and understanding of the work that we do through report automation. I would highly recommend this SEO performance tracker to anyone digitally growth-oriented.
cons: The only con would be that I find it hard to believe that the search volume for some keywords is zero

review_title: The best tool for keyword tracking
description: It has facilitated and speeded up my SEO work a lot, also allowing me to create excellent white label reports.
author: Gabriele R.
pros: Complete, simple and professional. I recommend it to anyone who is serious about SEO.
cons: Nothing to report. it is a simply fantastic tool. No problem so far.

review_title: Beautiful Design, Powerful set of tools
description: Our agency loves the tool and hasn't looked back since we made the switch from our previous tool. The reports and dashboards are awesome. Exactly what we were looking for in a rank tracking tool + so much more.
author: Steffan H.
pros: I love the side-by-side comparison of rankings in the Local Pack and regular Organic Results. Our previous rank tracking software did not have this feature and It made it difficult to get the overall picture. I also LOVE the design.. It is beautiful and so much fun to look at. Nightmode is where it's at.
cons: They have a great feature where you can pull in traffic data from Google Analytics and graph the comparison to other SEO metrics. However, I wish you could filter to only organic traffic, not all traffic sources.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best rank tracking tool I've used
description: Nightwatch allows us to track all the necessary SEO KPIs: Traffic, rankings, backlinks, competition, search visibility, ... etc
author: Matej B.
pros: Before discovering Nightwatch we had to use multiple tools to track all the website SEO metrics. With Nightwatch we track everything we need. It's the all-in-one solution we've been looking for.
cons: There is no mobile app to check your stats on the go.

review_title: Night watch.io saves me time and money
description: Nightwatch is a great tool. I use it to manage many parts of my agency, from keyword and backlink analyses to rankings, trends, and monthly reports. Nightwatch keeps me from having to use multiple tools and I think the price is right for the value it gives me.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Several tools in one for back links, keyword analysis, competitor insights, etc.
cons: There are no features of Nightwatch that I don’t like.
